filename: The Good Practice - Pilot Proposal October 8th 2024.docx
summary: This document outlines a pilot proposal for implementing KeepMeCompany's AI-driven intake system at 'The Good Practice' GP surgery. It details a two-phase approach involving technology testing, workflow integration, and impact measurement over an 8-9 week period. The proposal specifies time commitments for GPs and receptionists, communication protocols, and key success metrics like consultation time savings and patient satisfaction.
